headline_seed: Trump to impose 'forced labor' duties on Friday as temporary 10% US tariffs expire - Reuters
draft_text:
New tariffs on 60 trading partners — 10% to 12.5% — took effect at 12:01 a.m. ET Friday, covering roughly 99% of US imports. CNBC and CBS News report the measure replaces the expiring Section 122 worldwide tariffs and runs under Section 301.

And that's the mews.
